title: stevia selloi
intro: Stevia selloi, also known as the "cedronillo" or "cedron," is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and lowering blood pressure. Stevia selloi can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
